reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Luciana and her colleague provided excellent and friendly service. They offered me their combo deals and were very attentive. I am very satisfied with the service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6742742050423821099/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xocmJtSmZjRUZWZGtaTVRFdDVNWEJOVEZoM2JuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buenas las hamburguesas son exactamente igual a las fotos de la propaganda y son riquísimas, la gaseosa fresquita a punto. La atención re cordial de las chicas. También el late Caramel mucho más rico que en otras Full. Las canastas de crema y batata riquísimas! 10/10

(Translated by Google)
The burgers are excellent, exactly like the pictures in the ads, and delicious. The soda is perfectly chilled. The service from the girls is incredibly friendly. The Caramel latte is also much better than at other Full locations. The sweet potato and cream baskets are amazing! 10/10

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de los empleados,muy amables y atentos. Lo único que piden consumir constantemente para poder permanecer en el local. Buen ambiente para trabajar, con wifi y baños solo para clientes. Si volvería.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff, very friendly and attentive. The only thing is that they require you to make a purchase regularly to be allowed to stay. Good work environment, with Wi-Fi and restrooms exclusively for customers. I would definitely return.
